productDisplayName: Nike Women Sweet Classic Purple Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic leather shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather upper with perforated side panels for superior breathability and protection from bad odour and sweatLace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug FitLightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfortAppliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statementEmbroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touchMidsoleEVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioningOutsoleRubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durabilityLeaf patterened herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the courtWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
